sglang.title: Adjust flashinfer workspace size for Qwen2 models
sglang.author: ispobock
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Fix issues #2344, #2102, #1405.
Qwen2 models (mostly Qwen2-7B) require higher flashinfer workspace size. This issue occurs on different types of hardware (SM80 & SM90). Temporarily fixed it with specific adjustments.
cc: @yzh119 @merrymercy @Ying1123 @xiezhq-hermann

vllm.title: Fix Max Token ID for Qwen-VL-Chat
vllm.author: alex-jw-brooks
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
FIX #11832
LLMEngine has validation (_validate_token_prompt) to check for out of vocabulary tokens if token prompts are provided, e.g., when calling a model running online. This relies on the value of the tokenizer's vocab size being correct.
The Transformers PreTrainedTokenizer class has an unimple

vllm.title: [Kernel] Attention.forward with unified_attention when use_direct_call=True
vllm.author: heheda12345
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Get kv_cache and attn_metadata from forward context instead of Attention.forward's argument by using unified_attention
This pr helps to achieve #9098
We can remove kv_cache and attn_metadata from all models after this pr!
CC @youkaichao

vllm.title: [Doc][V1] Update model implementation guide for V1 support
vllm.author: ywang96
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR updates the documentation for adding new models to vLLM so that they can be natively supported by V1.
For text-only language models there is mostly no changes other than adding a method that provides a unified interface for getting text embeddings.
For multimodal models, two additional metho

Within each category, different devices use tabs that switch together:

This allows us to share common documentatio

vllm.title: [Platform] Move get_punica_wrapper() function to Platform
vllm.author: shen-shanshan
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
What does this PR do?
This PR is a refactoring of punica wrapper, enabling the code of multi-lora to be platform-agnostic for better extensibility.
The get_punica_wrapper() function will dynamically load object according to current_platform.
Related works
Please see #11162.

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix deepseekv3 gate bias error
vllm.author: SunflowerAries
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Fix the logic in gate scores compute. FIX #11971
As stated in DeepSeek v3 paper, the newly-introduced bias term (e_score_correction_bias in vllm) is only used for routing, while the weight used to average each expert's output is the one without bias. you can also check the compute logic in DeepSeek
